Bash(python -c "
import urllib.request, zipfile, io, csv
url = 'http://data.gdeltproject.org/gdeltv2/lastupdate.txt'
req = urllib.request.Request\(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Sentinel/1.0'}\)
text = urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=30\).read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\).strip\(\)
csv_url = [l.split\(\)[2] for l in text.splitlines\(\) if '.export.CSV' in l][0]
print\(f'URL: {csv_url}'\)
raw = urllib.request.urlopen\(urllib.request.Request\(csv_url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Sentinel/1.0'}\), timeout=60\).read\(\)
with zipfile.ZipFile\(io.BytesIO\(raw\)\) as zf:
    rows = list\(csv.reader\(io.StringIO\(zf.read\(zf.namelist\(\)[0]\).decode\('utf-8','replace'\)\), delimiter='\\t'\)\)
    print\(f'Total rows: {len\(rows\)}'\)
    conflict = sum\(1 for r in rows if len\(r\)>57 and \(r[26].startswith\('18'\) or r[26].startswith\('19'\) or \(r[30].strip\(\) and float\(r[30]\)<-5\)\)\)
    print\(f'Conflict \(18/19 or GS<-5\): {conflict}'\)
" 2>&1)
